name: Sauce Picante
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Italian plum tomatoes; peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a sauce pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add onions, green onions, celery, bell peppers, jalapenos, shallots, and garlic to the pan. Cook over high heat until fragrant, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in basil, thyme, oregano, and bay leaves. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.
4. Stir in tomatoes, chicken stock, salt, cayenne pepper, and black pepper. Bring mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, stirring occasionally, until heated through, about 5 minutes.
6. Stir in butter and remove the pot from the heat.
